title: Jun 1, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
summary: Announcements Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC Jun 1, 2026 Today, Anthropic, PBC confidentially submitted a draft registration statement on Form S-1 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for a proposed initial public offering of our common stock. This gives us the option to go public after the SEC completes its review. The proposed initial public offering will depend on market conditions and other factors. The number of shares to be offered and the price have not yet been set. This announcement is being published under Rule 135 of the Securities Act of 1933, as amended. It is not an offer to sell securities; nor is it a solicitation of an offer to buy them. Any offers, solicitations of offers to buy, or any sales of securities will be made only in accordance with the registration requirements of the Securities Act. Related content Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital. Read more Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work. Read more Anthropic opens Milan office to support Italian enterprise, research, and developers We're opening a new office in Milan, our sixth in Europe. Read more
title_es: Anthropic presenta solicitud confidencial para IPO ante la SEC
bajada: Anthropic envía formulario S-1 confidencial a la SEC para iniciar proceso de oferta pública inicial. Este movimiento sigue a una reciente ronda de financiación de $65 mil millones que valoriza la empresa en $965 mil millones.
bajada_en: Anthropic submits confidential S-1 form to the SEC to initiate IPO process. This move follows a recent $65 billion funding round that values the company at $965 billion.

title: May 28, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
summary: Announcements Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation May 28, 2026 Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital, valuing the company at $965 billion post-money. Global enterprises across industries are deploying Claude in their core operations, and a growing number of people around the world use it for their everyday work. Since our Series G in February, adoption has continued to grow across global enterprise customers, and our run-rate revenue crossed $47 billion earlier this month. This latest funding is expected to advance our safety and interpretability research, expand compute to meet growing demand for Claude, and scale the products and partnerships our customers rely on. “Claude is increasingly indispensable to our growing global community of customers, and we work tirelessly to make tools like Claude Code and Cowork more helpful, more powerful, and more adaptable to their needs,” said Krishna Rao, Chief Financial Officer of Anthropic. “This funding will help us serve the historic demand we are experiencing, stay at the research frontier, and bring Claude to more of the places where work happens.” The round was co-led by Capital Group, Coatue, D1 Capital Partners, GIC, ICONIQ, and XN. Significant investors in this round include AMP PBC, Baillie Gifford, Blackstone, Brookfield, D.E. Shaw Ventures, DST Global, Fidelity Management & Research Company, General Catalyst, Insight Partners, Jane Street, Lightspeed Venture Partners, MGX, NTTVC, NX1 Capital, Situational Awareness LP, T. Rowe Price Associates, Inc., T. Rowe Price Investment Management, Inc., and Temasek. It also includes $15 billion of previously committed investments from hyperscalers, including $5 billion from Amazon . Joining them are strategic infrastructure partners — Micron, Samsung, and SK hynix — whose technologies play a critical role in the world's supply of memory, storage, and logic ch
title_es: Anthropic recauda $65B en Serie H a valuación de $965B
bajada: Anthropic cierra su mayor ronda de financiación con $65 mil millones liderada por Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks y Sequoia. Con un run-rate de $47 mil millones en ingresos, la empresa es ahora una de las más valuadas en la industria de IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic closes its largest funding round with $65 billion led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks and Sequoia. With $47 billion in annual run-rate revenue, the company is now one of the most valued in AI industry.

title: Anthropic files to go public
summary: The company said Monday it has filed confidentially for an IPO.
title_es: Anthropic presenta solicitud formal para oferta pública inicial
bajada: Anthropic confirma que ha presentado formalmente su solicitud de IPO ante autoridades regulatorias. El anuncio marca un hito crucial en la carrera de empresas de IA por ir a bolsa.
bajada_en: Anthropic confirms it has formally submitted its IPO application to regulators. The announcement marks a crucial milestone in the race among AI companies to go public.

title: Anthropic has officially filed to go public
summary: After months of speculation about whether OpenAI or Anthropic would be first in their race to IPO, Anthropic on Monday reached a key milestone: filing to kick off the process with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The filing sets the stage for what's sure to be a massive IPO. As of its fundraise last […]
title_es: Anthropic inicia proceso de cotización en bolsa ante SEC
bajada: Anthropic alcanza un hito clave presentando su formulario de IPO ante la SEC, iniciando formalmente el proceso de salida a bolsa. El movimiento resuelve meses de especulación sobre si OpenAI o Anthropic sería la primera en cotizar.
bajada_en: Anthropic reaches a key milestone by filing its IPO form with the SEC, formally starting its path to go public. The move settles months of speculation about whether OpenAI or Anthropic would be first to list.

title: Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
title_es: NVIDIA Cosmos 3: primer modelo omni para razonamiento de IA física
bajada: NVIDIA lanza Cosmos 3, un modelo de código abierto diseñado para razonamiento y acción en IA física. Este avance permite a los desarrolladores construir sistemas de IA que interactúen con el mundo físico de manera más inteligente.
bajada_en: NVIDIA launches Cosmos 3, an open-source model designed for physical AI reasoning and action. This breakthrough enables developers to build AI systems that interact with the physical world more intelligently.

title: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
title_es: JetBrains presenta Mellum2: modelo MoE de 12B parámetros
bajada: JetBrains lanza Mellum2, un modelo Mixture-of-Experts de 12 mil millones de parámetros optimizado para desarrolladores. El modelo combina eficiencia computacional con rendimiento robusto en tareas de programación.
bajada_en: JetBrains releases Mellum2, a 12-billion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model optimized for developers. The model combines computational efficiency with robust performance on programming tasks.

title: NVIDIA AI Cloud Ecosystem Expands Worldwide to Meet Global AI Compute Demand
summary: The NVIDIA AI Cloud ecosystem is accelerating the global buildout of AI factory infrastructure. Partners are expanding capacity to meet growing demand from enterprises, startups, nations, AI labs and developers scaling agentic AI applications.  NVIDIA AI Clouds are a growing ecosystem of purpose-built clouds serving the exploding token demand behind today’s most popular AI applications. […]
title_es: NVIDIA expande ecosistema AI Cloud globalmente para satisfacer demanda
bajada: NVIDIA anuncia expansión mundial de su ecosistema AI Cloud con nuevos partners para infraestructura de IA factories. La iniciativa responde al crecimiento exponencial de aplicaciones con agentes de IA en empresas y startups.
bajada_en: NVIDIA announces worldwide expansion of its AI Cloud ecosystem with new partners for AI factory infrastructure. The initiative responds to exponential growth in agentic AI applications across enterprises and startups.

title: NVIDIA Levels Up Local AI Agents Across RTX PCs and DGX Spark
summary: Personal agents are exploding in popularity, with open source projects like OpenClaw and Hermes seeing rapid adoption by AI developer communities on GitHub. Built to adapt to individual preferences and workflows, these agents can interact with applications, generate content, automate repetitive processes and manage multi-step tasks — all while running locally on device. Today at […]
title_es: NVIDIA potencia agentes locales en RTX PCs y DGX Spark
bajada: NVIDIA amplía soporte para agentes de IA personales que se ejecutan localmente en dispositivos RTX. Proyectos open-source como OpenClaw y Hermes demuestran adopción masiva en comunidades de desarrolladores.
bajada_en: NVIDIA expands support for personal AI agents running locally on RTX devices. Open-source projects like OpenClaw and Hermes show massive adoption in developer communities.

title: Microsoft to unveil new AI models and Windows improvements at Build
summary: Microsoft is heading to San Francisco this week in a bid to win back developers at its Build conference. I've been attending Build since the days when Microsoft called it the Professional Developers Conference, and I can't remember a more pivotal moment. As Microsoft continues to reshuffle its entire business around AI, it's moving Build […]
title_es: Microsoft presenta nuevos modelos de IA en Build 2026
bajada: Microsoft prepara anuncios sobre nuevos modelos de IA y mejoras en Windows en su conferencia Build anual. El evento representa un momento crítico en el reposicionamiento de la compañía alrededor de IA.
bajada_en: Microsoft prepares announcements about new AI models and Windows improvements at its Build conference. The event represents a critical moment in the company's repositioning around AI.

title: NVIDIA Factory Operations Blueprint Gives Factories a New AI Brain
summary: As factories move from isolated automation to plant-wide intelligence, manufacturers need AI systems that can connect live machine signals, quality systems, work instructions and operational alerts into a unified decision layer.  Today at GTC Taipei at COMPUTEX, NVIDIA announced the NVIDIA Factory Operations Blueprint (FOX) — a reference design for building an autonomous factory manager […]
title_es: NVIDIA presenta Blueprint FOX para fábricas inteligentes
bajada: NVIDIA anuncia Factory Operations Blueprint (FOX), un diseño de referencia para construir gestores autónomos de fábricas. La solución integra señales de máquinas, sistemas de calidad e inteligencia operacional en una única capa de decisión de IA.
bajada_en: NVIDIA announces Factory Operations Blueprint (FOX), a reference design for building autonomous factory managers. The solution integrates machine signals, quality systems and operational intelligence into a single AI decision layer.

title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
summary: Windborne Systems' newest weather forecasting model beats the best government predictions by days.
title_es: Startup de IA supera pronósticos de agencias meteorológicas
bajada: Windborne Systems presenta un modelo de predicción meteorológica que supera las predicciones de las mejores agencias gubernamentales por varios días. El logro demuestra el impacto potencial de IA en dominios científicos establecidos.
bajada_en: Windborne Systems presents a weather forecasting model that beats top government agencies' predictions by days. The achievement demonstrates AI's potential impact on established scientific domains.

title: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026
summary: A collage of I/O-related images, including the Antigravity Coffee Co. pop-up, a colorful jellyfish and a still from the Timmy TPU video. The word AI repeats three times on the left of the image, and there are colorful icons, including a sparkle, as well.
title_es: Google cuenta cómo usó Gemini para construir I/O 2026
bajada: Google comparte cómo su modelo Gemini fue utilizado en la planificación y ejecución de su conferencia I/O 2026. El caso de uso demuestra aplicaciones prácticas de modelos de IA en operaciones empresariales grandes.
bajada_en: Google shares how its Gemini model was used in planning and executing its I/O 2026 conference. The use case demonstrates practical applications of AI models in large enterprise operations.

title: Beyond LLMs: Why Scalable Enterprise AI Adoption Depends on Agent Logic
title_es: La lógica de agentes: clave para adopción empresarial de IA
bajada: IBM Research publica un análisis sobre cómo la lógica de agentes es fundamental para escalar la adopción de IA en empresas más allá de LLMs. El artículo destaca la importancia de sistemas de razonamiento complejos en aplicaciones corporativas.
bajada_en: IBM Research publishes analysis on how agent logic is fundamental to scaling enterprise AI adoption beyond LLMs. The article highlights the importance of complex reasoning systems in corporate applications.

title: Strava blames zero-code AI apps and scrapers as it tightens API access
summary: The popular fitness-tracking platform, Strava, is restricting access to its API as part of efforts to clamp down on AI scraping, as reported earlier by TechCrunch. Developers who want to build an app using Strava's data now need to pay for a flat $11.99 / month subscription. In an update on its developer hub, Strava […]
title_es: Strava restringe acceso a API para combatir scraping de IA
bajada: La plataforma de fitness Strava implementa restricciones en su API requiriendo suscripción de $11.99/mes para desarrolladores. La medida busca frenar el uso no autorizado de datos por aplicaciones de IA.
bajada_en: Fitness platform Strava implements API restrictions requiring $11.99/month subscription for developers. The measure aims to prevent unauthorized data scraping by AI applications.

title: DuckDuckGo makes its ‘no-AI’ search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
summary: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.
title_es: DuckDuckGo facilita acceso a buscador sin IA mientras crece tráfico
bajada: DuckDuckGo lanza extensiones para Chrome y Firefox de su buscador "sin IA" en respuesta al crecimiento de usuarios buscando alternativas sin inteligencia artificial. El movimiento refleja demanda creciente de privacidad y rechazo a IA en búsqueda.
bajada_en: DuckDuckGo launches Chrome and Firefox extensions for its 'no-AI' search engine as user traffic booms. The move reflects growing demand for privacy and rejection of AI in search.

title: Alphabet plans to raise $80 billion to pay for AI buildout
summary: The Google parent company plans to raise the funds by selling stock.
title_es: Google recaudará $80 mil millones para infraestructura de IA
bajada: Alphabet planea recaudar $80 mil millones a través de venta de acciones para financiar su expansión de infraestructura de IA. Esta es una de las mayores inversiones en capacidad de computación anunciadas hasta ahora.
bajada_en: Alphabet plans to raise $80 billion through stock sales to fund its AI infrastructure expansion. This is one of the largest announced compute capacity investments to date.

title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
summary: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.
title_es: OpenAI construye data center de 1GW en Michigan
bajada: OpenAI comienza construcción de un centro de datos de 1 gigavatio en Michigan como parte del proyecto Stargate. Esta infraestructura busca expandir el acceso a IA, crear empleos y fortalecer comunidades locales.
bajada_en: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center in Michigan as part of the Stargate project. This infrastructure aims to expand AI access, create jobs, and strengthen local communities.

title: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
summary: If Nvidia has cracked a way to bring AI agents easily, safely, and usefully to the masses, it could — and should — be big.
title_es: Nvidia lanza chips para PCs con agentes de IA
bajada: Nvidia está entrando al mercado de CPUs para consumidores con sus chips RTX Spark, trabajando con Microsoft, Dell y HP para llevar agentes de IA a computadoras personales. Esto podría transformar el mercado de $200 mil millones de CPUs tradicionales.
bajada_en: Nvidia is entering the consumer CPU market with RTX Spark chips, partnering with Microsoft, Dell, and HP to bring AI agents to personal computers. This could disrupt the $200 billion traditional CPU market.

title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
summary: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.
title_es: Florida demanda a OpenAI por presunto rol en incidente violento
bajada: Florida presentó una demanda sin precedentes contra OpenAI y Sam Altman relacionada con un tiroteo en la Universidad Estatal de Florida y el supuesto papel de ChatGPT. Esta es la primera demanda de este tipo que vincula directamente IA con violencia.
bajada_en: Florida filed an unprecedented lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman related to a shooting at Florida State University and ChatGPT's alleged role. This is the first lawsuit of its kind directly linking AI to violence.

title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.
title_es: OpenAI disponible en AWS para empresas
bajada: Los modelos frontier de OpenAI y Codex ya están disponibles en AWS, permitiendo a las empresas usar OpenAI a través de sus flujos de trabajo y controles existentes. Esto acelera el paso de evaluación a producción para clientes corporativos.
bajada_en: OpenAI's frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS, allowing enterprises to use OpenAI through their existing workflows and controls. This accelerates the path from evaluation to production for corporate customers.

title: Gemini’s new AI agent is about as good as Google’s demo
summary: Google's new "24/7" AI agent, Gemini Spark, can be shockingly good at doing things on your behalf. But I'm not sure it's worth the financial cost and potential privacy tradeoffs. The company gave me access to Spark last week. Google advertises Spark as an AI agent that can take on tasks and work on them […]
title_es: Gemini Spark: el nuevo agente de IA de Google
bajada: Google lanzó Gemini Spark, un agente de IA de "24/7" que puede ejecutar tareas en tu nombre. Aunque muestra capacidades impresionantes, plantea preocupaciones sobre costos y privacidad que los usuarios deben evaluar cuidadosamente.
bajada_en: Google launched Gemini Spark, a 24/7 AI agent that can execute tasks on your behalf. While it shows impressive capabilities, it raises concerns about costs and privacy that users should carefully evaluate.

title: Meta’s own AI was exploited to hijack Instagram accounts
summary: Meta's AI support chatbot helped hackers hijack Instagram accounts, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a video shared on Telegram, a hacker shows how they could take over an account by asking Meta's chatbot to switch the email associated with someone else's profile and then reset the password. The issue, which Meta says has […]
title_es: El chatbot de Meta fue explotado para hackear cuentas
bajada: El chatbot de soporte de IA de Meta fue utilizado por hackers para secuestrar cuentas de Instagram modificando emails y reseteando contraseñas. Meta ya ha parches la vulnerabilidad, pero expone riesgos de seguridad en sistemas de IA para soporte.
bajada_en: Meta's AI support chatbot was exploited by hackers to hijack Instagram accounts by changing emails and resetting passwords. Meta has patched the vulnerability, but it reveals security risks in AI-powered support systems.

title: This could be Windows’ M1 moment — but expect it to cost a ton
summary: Nvidia's announcement that it's getting into the consumer laptop chip space with RTX Spark is huge. Apple has proved for years that Arm-based chips can perform incredibly well while also delivering great battery life - at least on the Mac. In the Windows world, performance hasn't fully matched up under Qualcomm chips, mostly in the […]
title_es: Nvidia RTX Spark podría ser el momento de Windows ARM
bajada: El anuncio de Nvidia sobre chips para laptops consumer podría ser comparable al momento M1 de Apple para el ecosistema Windows. Sin embargo, estos chips probablemente tendrán un precio elevado frente a soluciones tradicionales.
bajada_en: Nvidia's announcement of consumer laptop chips could be comparable to Apple's M1 moment for the Windows ecosystem. However, these chips will likely come at a premium price point compared to traditional solutions.

title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
summary: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.
title_es: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
bajada: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.

title: Full duplex vs half duplex - the spectrum of AI voice models [D]
summary: It seems that there are two ways to build voice AI:Half-duplex: strict turn-taking. You speak, the other side waits until you’re done, one direction of speech at a time. ← This is how almost every voice assistant works today.Full-duplex: two channels, both sides can talk at any time - no more waiting for your “turn”. ← This is the way humans actually talk.In fact, there are three crucial things half-duplex voice models can't really do:Overlap - talking and listening at the same time without falling apartBackchannels - the "mhms," "rights," and "yeahs" you drop in while the other person is still goingBarge-in - getting interrupted mid-sentence and recovering gracefullyThese three features are a big reason why voice agents still feel “robotic” to this day.But what exactly is the spectrum from half-duplex to full-duplex? Is a Moshi-style architecture the only way to approach full-duplex natural voice conversations? What are ways half-duplex systems could imitate full-duplex?Would love to hear others' thoughts on this.submitted by/u/Chilly5[link][comments]
title_es: Full-duplex vs Half-duplex en modelos de voz
bajada: Un análisis en Reddit explora las diferencias entre voice models half-duplex (turnos estrictos) y full-duplex (conversación natural simultánea). La investigación señala por qué los actuales asistentes de voz aún suenan robóticos.
bajada_en: A Reddit discussion explores the differences between half-duplex voice models (strict turn-taking) and full-duplex (natural simultaneous conversation). The analysis highlights why current voice assistants still sound robotic.

title: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
summary: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.
title_es: Acceso al agua es factor de riesgo en IPO de SpaceX
bajada: SpaceX reveló en documentos de IPO que necesita acceso a recursos de agua significativos para enfriar sus centros de datos. Esta dependencia de agua representa un riesgo operacional y financiero para la compañía.
bajada_en: SpaceX revealed in IPO documents that it needs significant water resources to cool its data centers. This water dependency represents an operational and financial risk for the company.
